title: MikroTik RJ45 SFP+ 10/100/1000M/2.5G/5G/10G copper module
description: This unique module opens up a whole world of high speed connectivity possibilities, offering up to 10 Gbps speeds over regular familiar twisted-pair cables in your existing products that have SFP+ ports. Any MikroTik device that has SFP+ ports can now be used without installing any optical fiber, just plug the S+RJ10 and your network can be upgraded to 10 Gbps, making it ready for the next generation of RJ45 hardware
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Metallic Transmission speed 10 Mbps, 1 Gbps, 2.5 Gbps, 5 Gbps, 10 Gbps Distance [km] 0,2 Transfer type Metallic Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors RJ45 Power Max. power consumption [W] 2,4 General Compatibility Universal
